pages.raw_text:
The Spokane Central Labor
union is one of the few central
labor organizations in the country
that never adopted resolutions
against the prosecution of the OF,
ficers of the Western Federation or
Miners.


The fact that the local central
body did not take such action was
due to willingness to await the re-
suit of the trial in the belief that
there could be but one result, the
complete vindication of the accused
If they are innocent.


Resolutions were adopted by the
Spokane organization asking that
the men be allowed bail while
awaiting trial, but no other action
was taken in relation to the case.


Among local union men there are
few who will yet believe that the
accused men were in partnership
with Orchard in his criminal career
and the majority express the opin'
ion that Orchard has attempted to
throw the blame on other shoulders
in order to save his own neck.


They say it is reasonable to sup
pose that a man who could per
petrate the crimes enumerated by
Orchard in his testimony would not
hesitate to swear away the lives OF
the officers of the federation if by
so doing he thought he saw a
chance of mitigating his own pun
iShment.
